name: Target Weight Calculator
description: Calculate target weight based on goals.
seo_title: Target Weight Calculator – Free Online Tool
seo_description: Use our free target weight calculator to quickly estimate target, to_lose based on current, goal_bmi, height. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate target weight for BMI of 22.5 at 175cm.
result_context: The weight a perder es diferencia between current and target; loss saludable es 0.5-1kg/week.
formula_display: Weight target = IMC target × height (m)²; A perder = weight current - weight target
steps: Ingresa height in cm and conviértela a meters
Define IMC target (22 es punto medio saludable)
Calculate: weight target = IMC target × altura²
Resta weight current - weight target to ver cuánto perder
mistakes: Fijar IMC target <18.5 (low weight with riesgos of health)
Esperar loss lineal (hay mesetas, fluctuaciones per water)
No Consider recomposición corporal (puedes mantener weight ganando músculo)
desc: Free online target weight calculator. Enter current weight and goal bmi to get instant results.
